description: Checklist for reward distribution, transfer hooks, claim-on-behalf, rounding, holder arrays, and reward shutdown behavior.
core_invariants: each participant’s accrued reward must be preserved across claims, transfers, burns, and exits
rounding remainders must not create material unfairness or loss
holder lists and distribution tokens must not be mutable in ways that double-claim or brick cycles
common_bug_classes: zero amount transfer mutates holder list
check_items: Trace reward index update before every balance mutation
Test zero amount transfer/burn and holder list uniqueness
Evaluate low-decimal reward tokens and small rewards
Check owner list changes during active distribution cycle
test_ideas: pending rewards then transfer/burn before claim
zero transfer repeatedly to mutate holders
change distributable tokens between claim steps
